description_long: This is a decorative ceramic plate with a wide, shallow profile and a gently sloping rim. The central area of the plate is a soft green color, adorned with whimsical illustrations of small white birds and pink flowers, arranged in a playful pattern. The rim features a vibrant border of three-dimensional floral decorations, including orange and purple pansies and green fern leaves, giving the plate a lively and ornate appearance. The flowers and leaves are raised above the surface, adding texture and visual interest. The rest of the plate is a clean, glossy white, providing a striking contrast to the colorful embellishments. This plate is both functional and ornamental, suitable for display or serving light foods.
description: A decorative ceramic plate with a green center, whimsical bird and flower illustrations, and a raised, colorful floral border on a white background.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from above, clearly showing the green center with bird and flower illustrations and the full arc of raised floral decorations along the rim.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the three-dimensional nature of the floral decorations, especially the prominent purple and orange flowers on the rim.
description_view_2: The plate is viewed from a lower angle, emphasizing the depth and relief of the raised flowers and the gentle slope of the rim.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the arrangement of the floral decorations along the rim and the playful pattern of birds and flowers in the green center.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative patterns of birds, flowers, and raised floral elements are visible on the center and rim.
